description: Mexican criminal organization that splintered from Los Zetas in 2014, founded by José Guizar Valencia (Z-43) and Antonio Salas Perea. Based in northern Veracruz, it operates in multiple Mexican states and engages in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, murder, and oil theft. The group claims to continue the original brutal business of Los Zetas.

country_links.evidence_quote: murdered an untold number of Guatemalan civilians during the systematic takeover of the Guatemalan border region
country_links.context: The Zetas Vieja Escuela murdered Guatemalan civilians during a takeover of the Guatemalan border region.

country_links.evidence_quote: he is responsible for importing thousands of kilograms of cocaine and methamphetamine to the US every year
country_links.context: The Zetas Vieja Escuela imports cocaine and methamphetamine to the United States.
